Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel and Defendant in Propria Persona for failure to obtain Judgment or file Dismissal after Binding Arbitration is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Dismissal on file. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff. No appearance by Defendant in Propria Persona. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Heretofore set for a Miscellaneous Order to Show Cause on 3/25/2010 at 10:30 AM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Defendant in Propria Persona is sanctioned $100.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 2/03/2010 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. The court ordered the case for an Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel and Defendant in Propria Persona on 3/25/2010 at 10:30 AM in Department 212 for failure to obtain judgment or dismissal after binding arbitration. Proceedings not reported. (212)
